fixes_required_before_rerun: Window the parser to the decode phase, or attribute per-phase, so extend cannot be counted as decode.
Issue a throwaway 1-token request after the prime so the extend is already resident, leaving the profiled request pure decode.
Reconcile traced GPU-busy against wall time per step and report the gap rather than assuming full coverage.
intent: Profile Laguna's native block-FP8 decode at depth to find the limiting kernels, comparable to the 2026-07-18 auto-path categories.

NOT_yet_established: Why exactly 10 extend calls. Unattributed. Until that is explained, '1 token costs 354 ms' is a hypothesis.
Whether the 10 calls belong to the profiled request at all, versus residual work from the cold prime.
Decode GPU-busy was only ~1.07 ms/step/rank against ~40 ms/step wall under profiling, which does not reconcile and suggests the trace does not cover all decode work.
lead_worth_its_own_experiment.corroborating: Cross-team note already in README: triton extend downcasts live q into the KV-cache dtype, so an fp8_e4m3 fleet default makes every R9700 prefill pay it.
lead_worth_its_own_experiment.observation: The profiled request was the agentic multi-turn shape: 197,193 CACHED tokens plus 1 new token. That single extend appears to cost ~354 ms of GPU time, roughly 8x the entire 40-step decode (42.8 ms).
lead_worth_its_own_experiment.why_it_matters: Appending one token after a long cache hit is exactly the tool-result path both FP8 flagships run in production. If real, per-turn cost at depth is dominated by extend, not generation.

status: INVALID as a decode breakdown - retained for the lead it surfaced
why_invalid: The trace captured an extend/prefill phase BEFORE the decode window and attributed it to 'attention'.
_fwd_kernel (extend) ran 10 times at ~35.4 ms each, spanning +4.9..+348 ms, totalling 357.6 ms = 98.7% of that kernel's time.
The decode window is +394.9..+437.7 ms -- 42.8 ms for all 40 steps -- entirely after those calls.
The reported 92.9% 'attention' share is therefore prefill/extend, not decode attention. The real decode kernel, _fwd_grouped_kernel_stage1, was 42 calls at 51.7 us.
